message:
feat(wa-core): TextMatch wait conditions, session_end/auth_required workflows, and event refactor

workflows.rs (+816 lines):
  Add the TextMatch wait condition system, enabling workflows to pause
  until specific text patterns appear in pane output:
  - TextMatch enum with Substring and Regex variants, each producing a
    WaitMatcher via the existing PaneWaiter infrastructure.
  - Integration with the WaitCondition enum so workflows can specify
    text-based gates alongside existing Pattern/PaneIdle/StableTail.
  - handle_session_end workflow: captures and stores structured session
    summaries when an agent session terminates, extracting key metrics
    (duration, commands, exit status) from the terminal output.
  - handle_auth_required workflow: detects authentication prompts that
    require user intervention or automated credential injection, logging
    the auth challenge type for audit.

events.rs (136 lines changed):
  Refactor event type definitions to support the new session_end and
  auth_required event kinds. Restructure event matching to use a more
  extensible pattern-based dispatch instead of hardcoded event type
  checks, enabling new workflow triggers without modifying the core
  event loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
